title: Beautiful Ornaments [Fantastic Cosmetic Series]
description: Craft and wear the most beautiful ornaments
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Trinkets

### Strongly recommended
- Roughly Enough Items - to see the many recipes!

# 💎 Features
###  Craft and wear a massive amount of ornaments!

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc7bef291cf819ceb51504191a06796bf524f082_0.webp)

### Cut gems in many shapes!
 

To craft an ornament you first will need to cut a gem in the Gem Cutting station

![gem_cutting_station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2ef8bfadfc4e4553a7e8f1765be977db23d471e.png)

Choose between 5 different cuts and your are ready for the next step!

![gem_cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc1646c9441f5f88b00ecf7f88dead397163a08c.png)

### Assemble your Ornament!
 

To finally be able to craft an ornament combine a ring/chain and a cut gem in the Ornament Crafting Station

![ornaments_crafting_station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbeeabdd580036e173a0c1332559c787eb498c52.png)

Craft a ring or a chain with a cut gem!

![ornaments_crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d02aab5c43eb896d5c2bb1d03b51f2eae7c2e42.png)

And now you can wear a beautiful ornament!

### To many to wear? Then put them on display!

Choose beetween 5 different materials 

![Displays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd9e899c9d55a8b4da36584f8e11fb7f0cb3fa9.png)
